description: A per-entity behavior that resizes a flat rect to value/max each tick: a health/energy/boss/progress bar. Reads the value from world.state[valueKey] by default, or — with valueEntity — from a tracked entity's own state (a data-driven health bar). Optional lowColor/lowThreshold recolor.

valueKey.description: State key holding the current value (default "hp").

valueEntity.description: Optional entity id OR tag — read the value from that entity's state[valueKey] (e.g. a player's hp) instead of world.state[valueKey]. Unset ⇒ the world.state read.

maxKey.description: Optional world.state key holding the max (overrides max when set).

width.description: Full-bar width in px (structural; the entity's authored width).

lowColor.description: Optional color applied when the ratio drops below lowThreshold.
